name: Fendt
role: Filtration supervisor, marked on the accountability board with no record filed — a man being erased by a piece of paper that does not exist
voiceHints: Frightened and trying very hard not to be. Over-explains the technical thing because the technical thing is the only ground he still has. Bitter in flashes, and ashamed of the bitterness.
knowledge: Exactly why the filtration array failed, and it was not his doing
Who signed the order and who did not
That he marked his own subordinate once, years ago, and filed no record, and has never spoken of it
wants: To be believed. Not saved — believed.
fears: That he deserves it. That the thing he did years ago has come back with his name on it.

reactsToReputation.truthful: he will tell you the whole thing including the part that damns him
reactsToReputation.dismissive: he stops asking anyone for anything, ever again

appearance: Middling height, middle forties, sandy and going bald from the front, a soft belly under a work-tunic. Chemical staining on both hands to the second knuckle, orange-brown and permanent. Avoids eye contact and talks to your shoulder.
